creator: maxpowerbsd@gmail.com
text:
The man page for getifaddrs(3) says:
   For all other address families, it contains a pointer to the 
   struct ifa_data (as defined in include file <net/if.h>) which contains 
   per‐address interface statistics.
The ifa_data struct does not appear in <net/if.h>. Is the manpageis outdated?

How-To-Repeat: man 3 getifaddrs
